fields.label: Item
fields.description: The item this buffer snapshot belongs to.

fields.label: Snapshot Date
fields.description: Date this buffer snapshot was taken.

fields.label: Buffer Type
fields.description: FG=Finished Goods | SFG=Semi-Finished | RM=Raw Material | PM=Packaging

fields.label: WIP / On-Order Qty
fields.description: F2: Work-in-progress (FG) from open Work Orders, or On-Order (RM) from open POs.

fields.label: Backorders / Committed
fields.description: F2: Reserved against Sales Orders (FG) or allocated to Work Orders (RM).

fields.label: Inventory Position (IP)
fields.description: F2: IP = On-Hand + WIP − Backorders (FG) or On-Hand + On-Order − Committed (RM)

fields.label: Target Buffer
fields.description: F1: Target = ADU × RLT × VF (or adjusted by DAF).

fields.label: Buffer Penetration %
fields.description: F3: BP% = (Target − IP) ÷ Target × 100. Higher = more urgent.

fields.label: Stock Remaining %
fields.description: F3 alt: SR% = IP ÷ Target × 100. SR% + BP% = 100% always.

fields.label: Zone
fields.description: F3: Green(0-33%) | Yellow(33-67%) | Red(67-100%) | Black(100%+ stockout)

fields.label: Suggested Order Qty
fields.description: F4: Order Qty = Target − IP. Exact quantity to restore buffer to 100%.

fields.label: Material Request
fields.description: The Material Request auto-generated for this snapshot (if any).
